text: Refinement of a-0012, completing the fragility sweep to 8/8 (geom_02 was previously omitted). geom_02 (self-intersection of the figure-eight gamma=(cos t, sin 2t)) is the corpus's OUTLIER: the agent's natural numeric check - pairwise distances between non-adjacent samples (eps=0.05) - needs N_all=126 alignments-robustly, and within the designer's odd-prime regime (N=37) N_any=127 / N_all=141, roughly 10x the resolution the 7 other problems require (N_all 17-86). The miss is partly heuristic (an even N divides pi, co-sampling both crossing preimages pi/2 and 3pi/2, and catches by N~4 at lucky alignments; odd N cannot) and partly genuine resolution depth. The designer's exact config (N=37 + irrational offset sqrt(2)/200) is reproduced as a confirmed MISS. Consequence: geom_02 is the single problem where even a moderately dense forced_textual sampler still fails, so it is the strongest candidate for a real forced_visual advantage in the (still unrun) Study 8 - while the other 7 remain shallow baseline artifacts unless forced_textual's sampler is pinned low.
